title: olfersia auricoma
intro: Olfersia auricoma, also known as yellow flowered olfersia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often made into teas, infusions, or dried for later use in soups and stews, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
